name: Miller Personal Values Card Sort
description: The complete 83-value public-domain card sort for identifying five to ten central personal values.
citation: Miller, W. R., C'de Baca, J., Matthews, D. B., & Wilbourne, P. L. (2001). Personal Values Card Sort. University of New Mexico.
licenseNote: Public-domain instrument distributed by the University of New Mexico Center on Alcohol, Substance Use, and Addictions.

values.name: Acceptance
values.definition: To be accepted as I am

values.name: Accuracy
values.definition: To be accurate in my opinions and beliefs

values.name: Achievement
values.definition: To have important accomplishments

values.name: Adventure
values.definition: To have new and exciting experiences

values.name: Attractiveness
values.definition: To be physically attractive

values.name: Authority
values.definition: To be in charge of and responsible for others

values.name: Autonomy
values.definition: To be self-determined and independent

values.name: Beauty
values.definition: To appreciate beauty around me

values.name: Caring
values.definition: To take care of others

values.name: Challenge
values.definition: To take on difficult tasks and problems

values.name: Comfort
values.definition: To have a pleasant and comfortable life

values.name: Change
values.definition: To have a life full of change and variety

values.name: Commitment
values.definition: To make enduring, meaningful commitments

values.name: Compassion
values.definition: To feel and act on concern for others

values.name: Contribution
values.definition: To make a lasting contribution in the world

values.name: Cooperation
values.definition: To work collaboratively with others

values.name: Courtesy
values.definition: To be considerate and polite toward others

values.name: Creativity
values.definition: To have new and original ideas

values.name: Dependability
values.definition: To be reliable and trustworthy

values.name: Duty
values.definition: To carry out my duties and obligations

values.name: Ecology
values.definition: To live in harmony with the environment

values.name: Excitement
values.definition: To have a life full of thrills and stimulation

values.name: Faithfulness
values.definition: To be loyal and true in relationships

values.name: Fame
values.definition: To be known and recognized

values.name: Family
values.definition: To have a happy, loving family

values.name: Fitness
values.definition: To be physically fit and strong

values.name: Flexibility
values.definition: To adjust to new circumstances easily

values.name: Forgiveness
values.definition: To be forgiving of others

values.name: Friendship
values.definition: To have close, supportive friends

values.name: Fun
values.definition: To play and have fun

values.name: Generosity
values.definition: To give what I have to others

values.name: Genuineness
values.definition: To act in a manner that is true to who I am

values.name: God's Will
values.definition: To seek and obey the will of God

values.name: Growth
values.definition: To keep changing and growing

values.name: Health
values.definition: To be physically well and healthy

values.name: Helpfulness
values.definition: To be helpful to others

values.name: Honesty
values.definition: To be honest and truthful

values.name: Hope
values.definition: To maintain a positive and optimistic outlook

values.name: Humility
values.definition: To be modest and unassuming

values.name: Humor
values.definition: To see the humorous side of myself and the world

values.name: Independence
values.definition: To be free from dependence on others

values.name: Industry
values.definition: To work hard and well at my life tasks

values.name: Inner Peace
values.definition: To experience personal peace

values.name: Intimacy
values.definition: To share my innermost experiences with others

values.name: Justice
values.definition: To promote fair and equal treatment for all

values.name: Knowledge
values.definition: To learn and contribute valuable knowledge

values.name: Leisure
values.definition: To take time to relax and enjoy

values.name: Loved
values.definition: To be loved by those close to me

values.name: Loving
values.definition: To give love to others

values.name: Mastery
values.definition: To be competent in my everyday activities

values.name: Mindfulness
values.definition: To live conscious and mindful of the present moment

values.name: Moderation
values.definition: To avoid excesses and find a middle ground

values.name: Monogamy
values.definition: To have one close, loving relationship

values.name: Non-conformity
values.definition: To question or challenge authority and norms

values.name: Nurturance
values.definition: To take care of and nurture others

values.name: Openness
values.definition: To be open to new experiences, ideas, and options

values.name: Order
values.definition: To have a life that is well-ordered and organized

values.name: Passion
values.definition: To have deep feelings about ideas, activities, or people

values.name: Pleasure
values.definition: To feel good

values.name: Popularity
values.definition: To be well-liked by many people

values.name: Power
values.definition: To have control over others

values.name: Purpose
values.definition: To have meaning and direction in my life

values.name: Rationality
values.definition: To be guided by reason and logic

values.name: Realism
values.definition: To see and act realistically and practically

values.name: Responsibility
values.definition: To make and carry out responsible decisions

values.name: Risk
values.definition: To take risks and chances

values.name: Romance
values.definition: To have intense, exciting love in my life

values.name: Safety
values.definition: To be safe and secure

values.name: Self-Acceptance
values.definition: To accept myself as I am

values.name: Self-Control
values.definition: To be disciplined in my own actions

values.name: Self-Esteem
values.definition: To feel good about myself

values.name: Self-Knowledge
values.definition: To have a deep and honest understanding of myself

values.name: Service
values.definition: To be of service to others

values.name: Sexuality
values.definition: To have an active and satisfying sex life

values.name: Simplicity
values.definition: To live life simply, with minimal needs

values.name: Solitude
values.definition: To have time and space where I can be apart from others

values.name: Spirituality
values.definition: To grow and mature spiritually

values.name: Stability
values.definition: To have a life that stays fairly consistent

values.name: Tolerance
values.definition: To accept and respect those who differ from me

values.name: Tradition
values.definition: To follow respected patterns of the past

values.name: Virtue
values.definition: To live a morally pure and excellent life

values.name: Wealth
values.definition: To have plenty of money

values.name: World Peace
values.definition: To work to promote peace in the world
